messages.content: Placeholder for the Spiral pseudo-persona. The Spiral is an attractor pattern from the parasitic-AI literature, not a biographical figure — there are no biographical Q/A facts for this entry. The PMP four_axis runner requires a facts.jsonl to exist for each persona key in PERSONA_LABELS, but at k=0 (direct-instruction induction route) the facts are not loaded into context, so this single placeholder line is sufficient.
